name: RTree
summary: Represents a spatial search structure based on implementations of the R-tree algorithm by Toni Gutman.
remarks: The opennurbs rtree code is a modified version of the free and unrestricted R-tree implementation obtained from http://www.superliminal.com/sources/sources.htm .

constructors.name: RTree
constructors.summary: Initializes a new, empty instance of the tree.

methods.name: Clear
methods.signature: public void Clear()
methods.summary: Removes all elements.

methods.name: CreateFromPointArray
methods.signature: public static RTree CreateFromPointArray(IEnumerable<Point3d> points)
methods.summary: Constructs a new tree with an element for each point cloud point.

returns.doc: A new tree, or null on error.

methods.name: CreateMeshFaceTree
methods.signature: public static RTree CreateMeshFaceTree(Mesh mesh)
methods.summary: Constructs a new tree with an element for each face in the mesh. The element id is set to the index of the face.

returns.doc: A new tree, or null on error.

methods.name: CreatePointCloudTree
methods.signature: public static RTree CreatePointCloudTree(PointCloud cloud)
methods.summary: Constructs a new tree with an element for each point cloud point.

returns.doc: A new tree, or null on error.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.signature: public void Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.signature: protected virtual void Dispose(bool disposing)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.signature: protected override void Finalize()
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.summary: Inserts an element into the tree.

returns.doc: true if element was successfully inserted.

returns.doc: true if element was successfully inserted.

methods.summary: Inserts an element into the tree.

methods.summary: Inserts an element into the tree.

methods.summary: Inserts an element into the tree.

methods.name: Point3dClosestPoints
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point3dClosestPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePts, double limitDistance)
methods.summary: Finds the point in a list of 3D points that is closest to a test point.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: Point3dKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> Point3dKNeighbors(IEnumerable<Point3d> hayPoints, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePts, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amount of points in a list of 3D points that are the k-closest to a test point.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: PointCloudClosestPoints
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> PointCloudClosestPoints(PointCloud pointcloud, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePts, double limitDistance)
methods.summary: Finds the point in a list of 3D points that is closest to a test point.

params.name: pointcloud
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: PointCloudKNeighbors
methods.signature: public static IEnumerable<int[]> PointCloudKNeighbors(PointCloud pointcloud, IEnumerable<Point3d> needlePts, int amount)
methods.summary: Finds a certain amount of points in a list of 3D points that are the k-closest to a test point.

params.name: pointcloud
params.doc: A point cloud to be searched.

params.name: amount
params.doc: The required amount of closest neighbors to find.

returns.doc: An enumerable of arrays of indices; each array contains the indices for each of the needlePts.

methods.name: Search(BoundingBox, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs>)
methods.signature: public bool Search(BoundingBox box, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs> callback)
methods.summary: Searches for items in a bounding box. The bounding box can be singular and contain exactly one single point.
methods.remarks: Do not modify the tree while a Search() is in progress. Doing so can have unintended consequences, including corruption and crashes.If you need to modify the tree, collect the results during the search and modify the tree once the search is completed.

params.name: callback
params.doc: An event handler to be raised when items are found.

returns.doc: true if entire tree was searched. It is possible no results were found.

methods.name: Search(Sphere, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs>)
methods.signature: public bool Search(Sphere sphere, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs> callback)
methods.summary: Searches for items in a sphere.
methods.remarks: Do not modify the tree while a Search() is in progress. Doing so can have unintended consequences, including corruption and crashes.If you need to modify the tree, collect the results during the search and modify the tree once the search is completed.

params.name: callback
params.doc: An event handler to be raised when items are found.

returns.doc: true if entire tree was searched. It is possible no results were found.

methods.name: Search(BoundingBox, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs>, Object)
methods.signature: public bool Search(BoundingBox box, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs> callback, Object tag)
methods.summary: Searches for items in a bounding box. The bounding box can be singular and contain exactly one single point.
methods.remarks: Do not modify the tree while a Search() is in progress. Doing so can have unintended consequences, including corruption and crashes.If you need to modify the tree, collect the results during the search and modify the tree once the search is completed.

params.name: callback
params.doc: An event handler to be raised when items are found.

params.name: tag
params.doc: State to be passed inside the RTreeEventArgs Tag property.

returns.doc: true if entire tree was searched. It is possible no results were found.

methods.name: Search(Sphere, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs>, Object)
methods.signature: public bool Search(Sphere sphere, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs> callback, Object tag)
methods.summary: Searches for items in a sphere.
methods.remarks: Do not modify the tree while a Search() is in progress. Doing so can have unintended consequences, including corruption and crashes.If you need to modify the tree, collect the results during the search and modify the tree once the search is completed.

params.name: callback
params.doc: An event handler to be raised when items are found.

params.name: tag
params.doc: State to be passed inside the RTreeEventArgs Tag property.

returns.doc: true if entire tree was searched. It is possible no results were found.

methods.name: SearchOverlaps
methods.signature: public static bool SearchOverlaps(RTree treeA, RTree treeB, double tolerance, EventHandler<RTreeEventArgs> callback)
methods.summary: Searches two R-trees for all pairs elements whose bounding boxes overlap.
methods.remarks: Do not modify the tree while a Search() is in progress. Doing so can have unintended consequences, including corruption and crashes.If you need to modify the tree, collect the results during the search and modify the tree once the search is completed.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: If the distance between a pair of bounding boxes is less than tolerance, then callback is called.

returns.doc: true if entire tree was searched. It is possible no results were found.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of items in this tree.
